services.name: Professional Listing Photos
services.shortDescription: Bright, clean, MLS-ready images that present each property clearly and professionally.
services.longDescription: Professional listing photography focuses on the rooms, exterior angles, and details buyers need to understand the home online. Each shoot is edited for a clean, consistent look and delivered for listing use.

services.name: Drone Photography & Video
services.shortDescription: Aerial stills and motion for properties where the setting, lot, or neighborhood matters.
services.longDescription: Drone photography and video add context that ground-level images cannot capture, especially for waterfront homes, acreage, large lots, and properties where the surrounding area helps tell the story.
features: Useful for waterfront, acreage, and luxury properties

services.name: Video Walkthroughs
services.shortDescription: Polished walkthrough coverage built for websites, social posting, and listing promotion.
services.longDescription: Video walkthroughs give buyers a more natural sense of flow, scale, and layout. They are useful for social media, listing pages, and marketing packages that need more than still photography.
features: Smooth interior and exterior walkthrough coverage
Optimized for social media, websites, and listing promotion
Clear pricing by size or scope
Simple add-on logic to pair with photo packages
